texto: He had passed through an ordeal of wretchedness which had given him more than it had taken away. He had lost all he possessed of worldly property
autor: he had sunk from his modest elevation down to a lower ditch than that from which he had started
explicacao: Citação de he had sunk from his modest elevation down to a lower ditch than that from which he had started sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “He had passed through an ordeal of wretchedness which had given him more than it had taken away. …” articula motivacao, inspiracional, reflexao em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e reflexao.
